hooks.command: result=$(cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}" && node scripts/verify-hashes.mjs 2>&1); if echo "$result" | grep -q 'VIOLATION\|Error\|error'; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"⚠ FROZEN FILE VIOLATION — $result\"}"; else echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"✓ Constitutional files verified: gate.py · dna.py · router.py — all hashes match.\"}"; fi

dirty=$(git -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -v ' aegis-runtime/target/'); if [ -n "$dirty" ]; then count=$(echo "$dirty" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"$count uncommitted file(s) — commit and push before ending session.\"}"; fi

msg=$(cat 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.notification // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$msg" | grep -q 'FROZEN FILE VIOLATION\|HASH VIOLATION'; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"⛔ CONSTITUTIONAL BREACH DETECTED — $msg — invoke guardian agent immediately\"}"; elif echo "$msg" | grep -q 'UNCOMMITTED SRC'; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"⚠ $msg — run Gate 8 and commit before continuing\"}"; fi
